newProducts.title: Google ADK-Go
newProducts.description: Open-source Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with code-first development, modular multi-agent systems, and cloud deployment capabilities.

newProducts.title: Claude Context
newProducts.description: MCP plugin that adds semantic code search to Claude Code, enabling entire codebase context using vector embeddings with ~40% token usage reduction.

newProducts.title: Bob the Fixer
newProducts.description: Open-source AI code-fixing tool that runs locally, helping developers identify and fix code issues automatically.

newProducts.title: CCPM
newProducts.description: Project management system for Claude Code using GitHub Issues and Git worktrees, enabling parallel agent execution with full traceability from PRD to code.

newProducts.title: Crystal
newProducts.description: Desktop app that runs multiple Codex and Claude Code AI sessions in parallel git worktrees for testing and comparing AI-assisted development approaches.

newProducts.title: LightRAG
newProducts.description: Simple and fast retrieval-augmented generation system supporting hybrid search, mix mode query processing, and multimodal data handling for EMNLP2025.

newProducts.title: VERL
newProducts.description: Volcano Engine Reinforcement Learning for LLMs, a flexible RL training library that enables easy extension of diverse RL algorithms and seamless integration with existing LLM frameworks.

newProducts.title: TrendRadar
newProducts.description: AI-powered tool that monitors hot topics across 35 platforms and analyzes news trends with keyword filtering, multi-channel push notifications, and AI analysis through MCP protocol.

insights.title: Agent design is still hard
insights.description: Mitsuhiko highlights that despite advances in LLM technology, designing effective AI agents remains challenging, indicating ongoing complexity in creating reliable agentic coding systems.
insights.author: Mitsuhiko

insights.title: We should all be using dependency cooldowns
insights.description: Simon Willison highlights dependency cooldowns as 'empirically effective' security strategy for software development, providing a practical security approach for modern development workflows.
insights.author: Simon Willison

insights.title: GPT-5.1-Codex-Max introduces compaction for long context tasks
insights.description: New AI model introduces 'compaction' technique for handling longer context windows in coding tasks, potentially improving the ability to work with larger codebases.
insights.author: AI Research Community

insights.title: Gemini 3 Pro gains YouTube URL support
insights.description: Google's Gemini 3 Pro model now supports processing YouTube URLs directly, expanding the multimodal capabilities for AI coding assistants that need to understand video content.
insights.author: Google AI Team

insights.title: TiDAR: Think in Diffusion, Talk in Autoregression
insights.description: New AI model approach published on arXiv that combines diffusion and autoregressive methods, potentially offering new paradigms for AI-assisted coding and reasoning.
insights.author: Research Community

insights.title: Weight-sparse transformers have interpretable circuits
insights.description: OpenAI paper reveals new insights into transformer interpretability, showing that weight-sparse transformers contain interpretable circuits, which could lead to more transparent and debuggable AI coding tools.
insights.author: OpenAI Research

insights.title: Netflix establishes GenAI guidelines for content production
insights.description: Netflix creates comprehensive guidelines for generative AI use in content production, reflecting enterprise adoption patterns and governance frameworks that could influence AI coding tool development.
insights.author: Netflix Technology Team
